+#include "cds/aotCompressedPointers.hpp"
+#include "cds/archiveBuilder.hpp"
+
+size_t AOTCompressedPointers::compute_byte_offset(address p) {
+  return ArchiveBuilder::current()->any_to_offset(p);
+}
